scripts.build: npm run build:extension && next build && node fix-extension-build.js
scripts.build:extension: esbuild src/background/background.ts --bundle --outfile=public/background.js --target=chrome100 && esbuild src/content/content.ts --bundle --outfile=public/content.js --target=chrome100 && esbuild src/capture/offscreen.ts --bundle --outfile=public/offscreen.js --target=chrome100
